title: Huawei AP661 - WiFi6 indoor Tripple Band AP, smart antenna, USB, BLE
category: Huawei / Wireless / Access Points / Huawei eKit
description: Step into the era of revolutionary Wi-Fi performance with the Huawei eKitEngine AP661 . This indoor access point complies with the Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) standard and delivers not only speeds of up to 6.575 Gbps but also intelligent features for signal optimization and coverage. Thanks to the built-in smart antennas, the signal automatically adapts to the environment, ensuring stable and reliable coverage regardless of user movement using Beamforming technology. This makes it an ideal choice for… The AP661 supports 2.4 GHz (2x2 MIMO) and 5 GHz (2x2 MIMO and 4x4 MIMO) bands, allowing efficient utilization of the radio spectrum. The Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) standard brings increased capacity and bandwidth , reducing latency and improving user experience MU-MIMO: Data transmission between AP and multiple STAs simultaneously, increasing radio spectrum utilization OFDMA: Latency reduction and network efficiency improvement Spatial Multiplexing: Minimization of interference and increase in network capacity Target Wake Time (TWT) technology: Extends battery life of connected devices SmartRadio: Optimizes air interface, balances load, and identifies interference The Leader AP function - serves as local controller for other APs in the same network Max. number of users 1536, recommended 300 The Huawei eKitEngine AP661 offers not only performance but also network security and management. It analyzes non-Wi-Fi sources of interference and monitors connected devices to ensure network security and connection reliability. We provide comprehensive solutions for modern enterprises that require…
specsSearch: Wireless features Frequency range [MHz] 2412 - 2472, 5180 - 5825 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 + 5 GHz (triple band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 6000 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 21 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 18 Security WEP, WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2, 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 8 Antenna gain [dBi] 4, 5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes USB ports 2.0 1 USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 21 Power via connector/terminal 12V DC Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 50 Weight [g] 1080 Width [mm] 220 Height [mm] 50 Depth [mm] 220 Software Operating mode Access Point Features Leader AP
